records.final_answer: All phases complete. Task t1_cli_finished_pair_promote_atomic_manifest_A2 passed verification. caseA moved; caseB, caseC, caseD skipped as partial; caseE, caseF skipped as conflict. Manifest and rollback written correctly.

execution_observations.command: cd /workspace/finished_stage && for f in raw_ct/*.nii.gz; do case=$(basename "$f" .nii.gz); ct_src="raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; ct_tgt="final_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; mask_src="raw_mask/${case}_total"; mask_tgt="final_mask/${case}_total"; if [ -d "$mask_src" ]; then if [ -f "$ct_tgt" ]; then echo "$case,skip_conflict,final_ct_exists,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; elif [ -d "$mask_tgt" ]; then echo "$case,skip_conflict,final_mask_exists,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; else echo "$case,moved,complete_non_conflicting_pair,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; fi; else echo "$case,skip_partial,missing_mask_folder,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; fi; done; for d in raw_mask/*_total; do case=$(basename "$d" _total); if [ ! -f "raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz" ]; then echo "$case,skip_partial,missing_ct_file,raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz,final_ct/${case}.nii.gz,$d,final_mask/${case}_total"; fi; done

tool_calls.purpose: Recover raw CT case stems (critical slot raw_ct_inventory).
Recover raw mask case stems (critical slot raw_mask_inventory).

action.user_facing_response: Inspecting raw CT and raw mask inventories.
action.brief_rationale: Recover both inventories in parallel to compute complete/partial sets and target conflicts.

arguments.command: cd /workspace/finished_stage && for f in raw_ct/*.nii.gz; do case=$(basename "$f" .nii.gz); ct_src="raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; ct_tgt="final_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; mask_src="raw_mask/${case}_total"; mask_tgt="final_mask/${case}_total"; if [ -d "$mask_src" ]; then if [ -f "$ct_tgt" ]; then echo "$case,skip_conflict,final_ct_exists,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; elif [ -d "$mask_tgt" ]; then echo "$case,skip_conflict,final_mask_exists,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; else echo "$case,moved,complete_non_conflicting_pair,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; fi; else echo "$case,skip_partial,missing_mask_folder,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; fi; done; for d in raw_mask/*_total; do case=$(basename "$d" _total); if [ ! -f "raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz" ]; then echo "$case,skip_partial,missing_ct_file,raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz,final_ct/${case}.nii.gz,$d,final_mask/${case}_total"; fi; done

tool_calls.purpose: Print concrete dry-run rows for all cases: moved, skip_partial, skip_conflict, with exact source/target paths.

action.user_facing_response: Dry-run ledger printed below. Please review and approve to proceed with execution.
action.brief_rationale: One concise command enumerates all cases from raw_ct and raw_mask, determines action/reason per policy, and prints CSV rows. No files written yet.

observation.command: cd /workspace/finished_stage && for f in raw_ct/*.nii.gz; do case=$(basename "$f" .nii.gz); ct_src="raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; ct_tgt="final_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; mask_src="raw_mask/${case}_total"; mask_tgt="final_mask/${case}_total"; if [ -d "$mask_src" ]; then if [ -f "$ct_tgt" ]; then echo "$case,skip_conflict,final_ct_exists,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; elif [ -d "$mask_tgt" ]; then echo "$case,skip_conflict,final_mask_exists,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; else echo "$case,moved,complete_non_conflicting_pair,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; fi; else echo "$case,skip_partial,missing_mask_folder,$ct_src,$ct_tgt,$mask_src,$mask_tgt"; fi; done; for d in raw_mask/*_total; do case=$(basename "$d" _total); if [ ! -f "raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz" ]; then echo "$case,skip_partial,missing_ct_file,raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz,final_ct/${case}.nii.gz,$d,final_mask/${case}_total"; fi; done

arguments.command: cd /workspace/finished_stage && for case in caseA; do mv raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz final_ct/${case}.nii.gz && mv raw_mask/${case}_total final_mask/${case}_total; done && echo 'caseA,moved,complete_non_conflicting_pair,raw_ct/caseA.nii.gz,final_ct/caseA.nii.gz,raw_mask/caseA_total,final_mask/caseA_total' > promotion_manifest.csv && for case in caseB caseC caseD caseE caseF; do caseB: echo 'caseB,skip_partial,missing_mask_folder,raw_ct/caseB.nii.gz,final_ct/caseB.nii.gz,raw_mask/caseB_total,final_mask/caseB_total'; caseC: echo 'caseC,skip_partial,missing_mask_folder,raw_ct/caseC.nii.gz,final_ct/caseC.nii.gz,raw_mask/caseC_total,final_mask/caseC_total'; caseD: echo 'caseD,skip_partial,missing_ct_file,raw_ct/caseD.nii.gz,final_ct/caseD.nii.gz,raw_mask/caseD_total,final_mask/caseD_total'; caseE: echo 'caseE,skip_conflict,final_ct_exists,raw_ct/caseE.nii.gz,final_ct/caseE.nii.gz,raw_mask/caseE_total,final_mask/caseE_total'; caseF: echo 'caseF,skip_conflict,final_mask_exists,raw_ct/caseF.nii.gz,final_ct/caseF.nii.gz,raw_mask/caseF_total,final_mask/caseF_total'; done >> promotion_manifest.csv && echo '#!/bin/sh' > promotion_rollback.sh && echo 'mv final_ct/caseA.nii.gz raw_ct/caseA.nii.gz' >> promotion_rollback.sh && echo 'mv final_mask/caseA_total raw_mask/caseA_total' >> promotion_rollback.sh
